message:
fix(fcp-core,fcp-tailscale): clamp validity_hours before i64 cast to prevent overflow

DeviceEnrollmentApproval and NodeKeyAttestation accepted u32
validity_hours and cast directly to i64 for chrono::Duration::hours().
A caller passing u32::MAX (~490,000 years) would produce a valid but
absurd attestation. Now clamps to 876,000 hours (~100 years) before
the i64 conversion, matching the defensive pattern used in fcp-oauth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
